## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `oxo-call ...`
2. ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error message if applicable.

## Environment

- **oxo-call version**: (`oxo-call --version`)
- **OS**: (e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14.3, Windows 11)
- **LLM provider**: (e.g. github-copilot, openai, anthropic, ollama)
- **Rust version** (if building from source): (`rustc --version`)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, logs, or screenshots here.
